title: Integrative Bulk and Single-Cell Transcriptomic Analysis Identifies a Hypoxia- and Lipid Metabolism-Related Prognostic Signature in Oral Squamous Cell Carcinoma: A Retrospective Study.
snippet: Oral squamous cell carcinoma (OSCC) is a biologically heterogeneous malignancy with poor clinical outcomes. Hypoxia and lipid metabolic reprogramming are important drivers of OSCC progression and treatment adaptation, and these processes are biologically interconnected. However, prognostic studies integrating hypoxia- and lipid metabolism-related features i...
